item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education Oct 2015 - Jul 2019 > Ph.D. in theoretical physics (summa cum laude) Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research, Germany Humboldt-University Berlin, Germany Sep 2013 - May 2015 > M.Sc. in physics (honors) FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany University College London, United Kingdom Oct 2010 - Sep 2013 > B.Sc. in physics FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany Experience since Apr 2021 > Research Scientist Bethge Lab, Tuebingen AI Center, University of Tuebingen, Germany

item.title: Events
item.description: 2022 | 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 Upcoming Amsterdam Cooperation Colloquium, Jun 3, 2022 Caring for the future can turn the tragedy into a comedy for collective action under risk of collapse (Virtual Short Talk) SIAM Life Sciences Conference, Jul 11-14, 2022 Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Dynamics in Partially-Observable Stochastic Games (Virtual Talk) Past Events 2022 New Directions in Cooperative AI Seminar (CAIF), May 19, 2022 Collective Cooperative Intelligence (Virtual Talk) slides

item.title: Events
item.description: 2022 | 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 Upcoming Descriptive & Normative Models of Collective Behaviour Workshop, School of Mathematics, University of Leeds June 20-24, 2022 The Dynamics of Collective Learning (Virtual Talk) SIAM Life Sciences Conference, Jul 11-14, 2022 Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Dynamics in Partially-Observable Stochastic Games (Virtual Talk) Past Events 2022 Amsterdam Cooperation Colloquium, Jun 3, 2022 Caring for the future can turn the tragedy into a comedy for collective action under risk of collapse (Virtual Short Talk) video

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2022 | 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 Preprints Conceptualizing World-Earth System resilience: Exploring transformation pathways towards a safe and just operating space for humanity Anderies JM, Barfuss W, Donges JF, Fetzer I, Heitzig J, Rockström J (in review) preprint Peer-reviewed 2022 Modeling the effects of environmental and perceptual uncertainty using deterministic reinforcement learning dynamics with partial observability Barfuss W, Mann RP (2022)
